title: Chapter 95
content:
Chapter 95: Night

Denzel smirked pridefully, taking an eye full of his trembling target.

"Are you in heat, dear sister? Just look at how much you’re already dripping. An obedient whore like you should be fucked fiercely, don’t you think?"

His words made Sophia tremble.

Her entire face was crimson red. Heavy breaths escaped her lips one after another, as though simply being this close to him was enough to rob her of the ability to breathe properly.

Denzel moved forward, holding his cock as he guided himself toward her inviting pussy.

But right at that moment a loud commotion erupted outside.

Maria’s voice rang through the house, followed by the unmistakable sound of a door opening. Moments later, hurried footsteps began approaching.

"Shit. Shit."

Denzel immediately adjusted his trousers.

Sophia reacted just as quickly, hurriedly pulling her clothes back into place.

’Fucking hell...Maria is out, now of all times?!’ Denzel thundered inwardly.

As she straightened herself out and tried to regain her composure.

Even then, her face remained unbelievably flushed.

She kept lightly tapping her cheeks, almost as though she could force away the thoughts of everything that had just happened.

Unfortunately for her, those thoughts were still very much present.

"Are you okay?" Denzel muttered.

Sophia nodded weakly.

"D-Don’t worry."

A few moments later, Maria stepped inside.

"Um... hello, Denzel," she greeted.

Then her eyes wandered until the moment she noticed Sophia standing there, then her eyes widened.

"Sophia!? Sophia, you’re out of your room!"

She practically stumbled over her own words in excitement.

For that brief moment, Denzel thought.

’Oh right... she didn’t know she’d left the house.’

Before Sophia could say anything, Maria rushed forward.

Throwing her arms around Sophia, she pulled her into a tight embrace.

Tears instantly gathered in her eyes.

"I’m so sorry, Sophia. I’m so sorry."

She held onto her tightly, refusing to let go.

Sophia paused for a moment.

Then she gently wrapped her own arms around Maria, her cheeks still burning red.

"It’s okay, mum...it’s...it’s okay."

Her voice was soft as she returned the embrace.

For most people, it would have been a touching and heartfelt moment.

For Denzel, however, it only irritated him.

’Ugh! This fucking bitch. She just interrupted me and Sophia’s good time.’

’Ah, well, I suppose it’s my fault. I should have commanded Sophia to keep her moans down, but damn... she did nothing but feed my hunger.’

’Yeah, it doesn’t really matter. I’ll let that slide. I’ll let them be for now.’

’But in the morning, Sophia is definitely getting punished.’

’Yeah... there’s going to be some early-morning ass pounding waiting for her.’

It wasn’t long before Maria’s gaze drifted toward him.

Denzel noticed it immediately and simply smiled back.

***

After the matter was settled he made his way over to his bed and dropped onto it.

A low groan escaped his lips as he settled onto the mattress, staring up at the ceiling above.

’I’m not even sure if this is insomnia anymore. There’s just too much going through my head.’

’I think I’m feeling a little too hostile because of everything that’s been happening lately. All these sudden mysteries... I really can’t help but wonder what the hell all of this is.’

’Well, at the very least, I should probably get some rest.I’ve gotten Sophia and Maria back, so I should take some comfort in that, but...’

His thoughts paused.

’She was gone for so long. And now that I know her secret about working in the massage palor...’

’I’m definitely sure she doesn’t have any friends like she claimed she used to visit all the time....so I do have to wonder...where did she go today then?’

Letting out a soft sigh, Denzel shifted his gaze to the side.

Almost instantly, he spotted the familiar system screen floating quietly beside him.

His eyes narrowed slightly as he looked over the information displayed before him.

[Name: Denzel Ridrat]

[Age: 22 Years]

[Strength: 50]

[Agility: 60]

[Sense: 50]

[Vitality: 40]

[Stamina: 40]

[Mana: 15/15]

[Rank: D]

[Harem: 3]

[Taboo Points: 10]

[Titles Acquired: [The Motherfucker] [Marathon Man]]

’Hmm.’

Denzel stared at the screen for a few moments before nodding to himself.

’Well, seeing this, the harem member addition works exactly the way I thought it would...There are two requirements.’

’First, I have to hear "I love you" from one of the members. Second, I have to complete the harem bond with the girl. So that’s why the number hasn’t increased yet.’

His eyes lingered on the [Harem: 3] displayed before him.

’Sophia already confessed that she loves me. In fact, that was the first time she’d ever said it. But since I wasn’t able to complete the bond with her, it looks like the harem count still hasn’t gone up.’

Denzel let out a slow sigh and leaned back against the bed.

’Anyway, let’s just allocate these points.’

The moment the thought crossed his mind, the system screen updated.

[Name: Denzel Ridrat]

[Age: 22 Years]

[Strength: 50]

[Agility: 60]

[Sense: 50]

[Vitality: 40]

[Stamina: 50]

[Mana: 15/15]

[Rank: D]

[Harem: 3]

[Taboo Points: 0]

[Titles Acquired: [The Motherfucker] [Marathon Man]]

Denzel studied the updated statistics for a moment before eventually nodding.

’Well, I suppose this is fine for now. I’ll still need to increase these stats further tomorrow morning when I get some time alone with Sophia.’

A faint grin tugged at his lips as his gaze drifted back toward the ceiling.

’So until then, I guess I’ll just lie here and wait for sleep to finally come.’

With that thought, Denzel relaxed into the mattress.

The room gradually fell silent.

The sounds of the house seemed to fade away as the tension in his body eased.

And eventually, the sleep he had been waiting for finally arrived.

Before long, his consciousness began to drift.

The world around him grew distant as his eyes closed.

And as the hours quietly passed by, the night continued onward.

Until, at last, the long sensual night came to an end.
